욥기 33:1.content: “However, Job, please hear my speech, and listen to all my words.

욥기 33:2.content: See now, I have opened my mouth. My tongue has spoken in my mouth.

욥기 33:3.content: My words will utter the uprightness of my heart. That which my lips know they will speak sincerely.

욥기 33:4.content: The Spirit of God has made me, and the breath of the Almighty gives me life.

욥기 33:5.content: If you can, answer me. Set your words in order before me, and stand up.

욥기 33:6.content: Behold, I am toward God even as you are. I am also formed out of the clay.

욥기 33:7.content: Behold, my terror will not make you afraid, neither will my pressure be heavy on you.

욥기 33:8.content: “Surely you have spoken in my hearing, I have heard the voice of your words, saying,

욥기 33:9.content: ‘I am clean, without disobedience. I am innocent, neither is there iniquity in me.

욥기 33:10.content: Behold, he finds occasions against me. He counts me for his enemy.

욥기 33:11.content: He puts my feet in the stocks. He marks all my paths.’

욥기 33:12.content: “Behold, I will answer you. In this you are not just, for God is greater than man.

욥기 33:13.content: Why do you strive against him, because he doesn’t give account of any of his matters?

욥기 33:14.content: For God speaks once, yes twice, though man pays no attention.

욥기 33:15.content: In a dream, in a vision of the night, when deep sleep falls on men, in slumbering on the bed;

욥기 33:16.content: Then he opens the ears of men, and seals their instruction,

욥기 33:17.content: that he may withdraw man from his purpose, and hide pride from man.

욥기 33:18.content: He keeps back his soul from the pit, and his life from perishing by the sword.

욥기 33:19.content: He is chastened also with pain on his bed, with continual strife in his bones,

욥기 33:20.content: so that his life abhors bread, and his soul dainty food.

욥기 33:21.content: His flesh is so consumed away that it can’t be seen. His bones that were not seen stick out.

욥기 33:22.content: Yes, his soul draws near to the pit, and his life to the destroyers.

욥기 33:23.content: “If there is beside him an angel, an interpreter, one among a thousand, to show to man what is right for him;

욥기 33:24.content: then God is gracious to him, and says, ‘Deliver him from going down to the pit, I have found a ransom.’

욥기 33:25.content: His flesh will be fresher than a child’s. He returns to the days of his youth.

욥기 33:26.content: He prays to God, and he is favorable to him, so that he sees his face with joy. He restores to man his righteousness.

욥기 33:27.content: He sings before men, and says, ‘I have sinned, and perverted that which was right, and it didn’t profit me.

욥기 33:28.content: He has redeemed my soul from going into the pit. My life will see the light.’

욥기 33:29.content: “Behold, God does all these things, twice, yes three times, with a man,

욥기 33:30.content: to bring back his soul from the pit, that he may be enlightened with the light of the living.

욥기 33:31.content: Mark well, Job, and listen to me. Hold your peace, and I will speak.

욥기 33:32.content: If you have anything to say, answer me. Speak, for I desire to justify you.

욥기 33:33.content: If not, listen to me. Hold your peace, and I will teach you wisdom.”
